overview.minides: India's original sedan benchmark — now facelifted for 2026 with Honda SENSING ADAS, 360-degree camera, ventilated seats, and a 27.26 kmpl strong-hybrid option.
overview.description:
The 2026 Honda City facelift is sold across 8 variants spanning 4 trim levels — SV, V, VX, and ZX — plus the ZX e:HEV hybrid.

The petrol variants use a 1.5L i-VTEC DOHC engine (121 PS / 145 Nm) with a 6-speed MT or 7-speed CVT. The e:HEV hybrid pairs the same 1.5L petrol with Honda's two-motor strong-hybrid system for a combined 126 PS / 253 Nm and a claimed 27.26 kmpl. All variants get 6 airbags as standard, with Honda SENSING ADAS (Level 2) from the ZX trim. The 2026 facelift adds bi-projector LED headlamps, a connected DRL light bar, a honeycomb black grille, new 16-inch alloy designs, a 10.1-inch infotainment touchscreen, ventilated seats, and a 360-degree camera on the top trim.

suspension.additionalTech: Agile Handling Assist (AHA) — braking-based torque vectoring

1-5L-ehev-126ps.name: 1.5L e:HEV Two-Motor Strong Hybrid
1-5L-ehev-126ps.electricMotor: 108 PS (79 kW) Drive Motor + Generator Motor
